items.q: What does 'die Familie im Wandel' describe?
items.correct: The changing nature of the family in society
items.why: Students read it literally; it refers to social change in family structures, a current trend.
Students mistranslate it; Gleichberechtigung is equal rights, a key social-trends theme.

items.q: Which is an example of 'der demografische Wandel'?
items.correct: An ageing population and low birth rate
items.why: Students miss the meaning; demographic change concerns population structure shifts.

items.q: 'Die Migration' as a social trend means:
items.correct: The movement of people into the country
items.why: The answer examiners want is: The movement of people into the country. “A bird species” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
